Sample.title: Sample
Sample.description: A single recorded sign language coordinate sample

label.description: Label/name of the gesture in Spanish (e.g. GRACIAS)

coords.description: Flat list of 84 normalized coordinates representing wrist and 20 landmarks for left & right hands

ModelCentroid.title: ModelCentroid
ModelCentroid.description: Trained KNN model centroids representing averages for gestures

centroids.description: Key-value pair of label to 84-dimensional centroid array

users/{userId}/samples/{sampleId}.description: Collection of hand gesture samples recorded by the user

users/{userId}/models/{modelId}.description: Collection of trained centroid models for gesture classification
